Off Calendar Jun-14-2019 Off Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Set For Trial On Apr-29-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-13-2018 Assigned To Arbitration On Aug-27-18

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Jun-27-2018 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Macy's West Stores, Inc.'s demurrer to both causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Arlene R. Brown is overruled as to both causes of action. Liberally construed, the FAC adequately alleges claims for negligence and premises liability. The issue of whether the non-operating escalator used by Ms. Brown as a staircase was in a dangerous condition requires factual development and is not amenable to resolution on a demurrer. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600 =302/hk

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST STORES, INC.'S, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. An amended complaint was filed April 3, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, e-mail: torreanom@aol.org (L&M302)
